description: NHVR Bridge IQ v3 — Security Configuration (separate from nhvr-bridge-app)

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Full administrative access - manage bridges, restrictions, and attribute definitions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.BridgeManager
scopes.description: Create and edit bridge records and restrictions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Viewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to bridge and restriction data

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Uploader
scopes.description: Permission to perform mass uploads via CSV

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Executive
scopes.description: Read-only access to dashboards and KPI analytics

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Inspector
scopes.description: Create and manage inspection orders, defect records, and condition assessments

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Operator
scopes.description: Operational access - view bridge data, apply temporary restrictions, manage permits

role-templates.name: Inspector
role-templates.description: Bridge Inspector (AS 5100) - inspection orders, defects, condition ratings

role-templates.name: Operator
role-templates.description: Field Operator - view bridges, apply temporary restrictions, manage permits

role-templates.name: Executive
role-templates.description: Executive dashboard access - KPIs and analytics only

role-collections.name: NHVR_IQ_BridgeManager
role-collections.description: NHVR IQ v3 Bridge Manager / Engineer

role-collections.name: NHVR_IQ_Viewer
role-collections.description: NHVR IQ v3 General Staff Viewer
